german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Mostly Unnecessary
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues in the job market.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between customer-facing and core PM positions, indicating a specialized focus in the market.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 58% of positions classified as senior or above, leadership is a key focus.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal options for remote or hybrid arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All opportunities are located in Berlin, with no remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce
ai.subtitle: Only 12% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
